title: Marvel's Spider-Man 2
description: Swing through an expanded New York City as Peter Parker and Miles Morales while facing iconic villains in a cinematic superhero adventure.

title: Ghost of Yōtei
description: Travel through breathtaking feudal Japan as Atsu, a lone mercenary forging her own destiny in this highly anticipated samurai adventure.

title: Fortnite
description: Jump into the world's biggest battle royale with creative modes, fast-paced gameplay, and endless updates, fully optimized for PlayStation 5.

title: Forza Horizon 5
description: Explore the vibrant open world of Mexico with hundreds of the world's greatest cars. Experience stunning graphics, realistic driving physics, seasonal events, and endless racing adventures.

title: Minecraft
description: Mine, craft, build, and survive in an infinite sandbox world. Play solo or with friends in one of the most creative games ever made.

title: Marvel's Wolverine
description: A cinematic action adventure starring Wolverine, built with a dark red and black superhero tone.

title: Grand Theft Auto VI
description: The next massive open-world crime epic from Rockstar Games with neon Vice City energy.

title: Dune: Awakening
description: Survive Arrakis in an open world survival MMO set in the Dune universe.
